steps.title: Use g(0) to eliminate negative-base choices
steps.content: For any exponential $a^x$, we have $a^0 = 1$. The table shows $g(0) = 1$ (positive). Choices A and B have a leading negative sign, giving $-1$ at $x = 0$. Both are eliminated.

steps.title: Test g(1) to distinguish C from D
steps.content:
The table shows $g(1) = \frac{1}{25}$.
Choice C: $25^1 = 25 \neq \frac{1}{25}$. Eliminated.
Choice D: $\left(\frac{1}{25}\right)^1 = \frac{1}{25}$. Matches.

steps.title: Match to the answer choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — '$g(x) = -25^x$': Gives $g(0) = -1$, but the table shows $g(0) = 1$. ✗
  • Choice B — '$g(x) = -(\frac{1}{25})^x$': Gives $g(0) = -1$, but the table shows $g(0) = 1$. ✗
  • Choice C — '$g(x) = 25^x$': Gives $g(1) = 25$, but the table shows $g(1) = \frac{1}{25}$. ✗
  • Choice D — '$g(x) = (\frac{1}{25})^x$': Gives $g(0) = 1$ and $g(1) = \frac{1}{25}$, matching the table. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
